# Meteorec

> Meteorec (meteorec.si) is a personal weather station's website in Rečica ob Savinji, Zgornja Savinjska dolina, Slovenia (station ID IREICA1, 366 m elevation, 46.325779, 14.921137). It publishes live conditions and a continuous daily measurement archive since 7 November 2019 — temperature, precipitation, humidity, wind and pressure — for a valley with no official ARSO station of its own. Content, data and analysis are in Slovenian.

Data is original station measurement, not a forecast model. Reuse is free under CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) — attribute "Meteorec (meteorec.si), postaja IREICA1" and link back to https://meteorec.si/.

## Live conditions & data
- [Domača stran / trenutno vreme](https://meteorec.si/): current live readings plus interactive widgets (storms, agrometeo, air quality, pollen, sea/mountain conditions, paragliding).
- [Gobarska napoved](https://meteorec.si/gobarska-napoved/): daily mushroom-foraging fruiting index for five Zgornja Savinjska dolina forest locations, a 7-day outlook, and a month-by-month species calendar.
- [Vodostaj Savinje](https://meteorec.si/vodostaj-savinje/): Savinja river flow/level status combining a GloFAS 7-day forecast with live ARSO gauge readings, plus the historical flood timeline through August 2023.
- [Nevihtna napoved](https://meteorec.si/nevihte/): atmospheric-instability snapshot (CAPE, CIN, Lifted Index, Total Totals, K-index, wind shear) with 12-hour hail-risk and damaging-wind-risk outlooks for Rečica ob Savinji.
- [Agrometeo](https://meteorec.si/agrometeo/): growing-degree-day accumulation, hop phenology and disease risk, per-crop GDD milestones, 7-day frost alarm, spray-window and hay-drying outlooks, and water balance for Zgornja Savinjska dolina.
- [Kakovost zraka](https://meteorec.si/kakovost-zraka/): current EU AQI, pollutant levels (PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, SO2, CO) against EU limits, a 5-day pollen forecast, and health recommendations for Rečica ob Savinji.
- [Vreme za padalce](https://meteorec.si/vreme-za-padalce/): paragliding flyability score, hour-by-hour flying window (boundary layer height, wind, CAPE), and a 7-day outlook for Zgornja Savinjska dolina.
- [Vremenski arhiv](https://meteorec.si/vreme/): full daily/monthly/yearly measurement archive since 2019-11-07, the primary dataset page.
- [Vremenski rekordi](https://meteorec.si/rekord/): all-time station extremes (temperature, precipitation, wind).
- [Vremenski pojavi](https://meteorec.si/pojavi/): archives of frost days, hot days and heavy-rain days.
- [Vreme ta teden](https://meteorec.si/teden/): rolling 7-day summary.
- [Vremenski trendi](https://meteorec.si/trendi/): interactive long-run charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, pressure, dew point, solar, UV).
- [Klima](https://meteorec.si/klima/), [Padavine](https://meteorec.si/padavine/), [Temperatura](https://meteorec.si/temperatura/): monthly climate normals for Rečica ob Savinji.
- [history.json](https://meteorec.si/history.json): raw daily-summary JSON backing the archive.
- [Vremenski slovar](https://meteorec.si/slovar/): 46 meteorological terms (dew point, hail, CAPE-adjacent instability concepts, temperature inversion, etc.), each on its own page with a definition and a fact, several tied to Zgornja Savinjska dolina specifically.

## Nearby-location pages
- [Vreme Rečica ob Savinji](https://meteorec.si/vreme-recica-ob-savinji/)
- [Vreme Mozirje](https://meteorec.si/vreme-mozirje/)
- [Vreme Nazarje](https://meteorec.si/vreme-nazarje/)
- [Vreme Ljubno ob Savinji](https://meteorec.si/vreme-ljubno-ob-savinji/)

## Writing
- [Blog](https://meteorec.si/blog/): monthly weather summaries and event analyses for Savinjska dolina.
- [Vremenski dogodki](https://meteorec.si/novosti/): logged notable events (heat waves, droughts, records).
- [Poplave avgusta 2023](https://meteorec.si/blog/poplave-2023.html): in-depth account of the August 2023 Zgornja Savinjska dolina floods — causes, hydrological records, damage and recovery.

## About
- [O postaji](https://meteorec.si/o-postaji.html): station equipment, location and FAQ.
